figures.caption: Fig. 2. Comparison of ground truth and reconstructed dynamics. (a) The Duffing oscillator and (b) a differential-drive robot model.

Fig. 3. Eigenvalue spectra of the learned Koopman operators. (a) The Duffing oscillator and (b) a differential-drive robot. Dots (•) indicate eigenvalues within or on the unit circle, while crosses (×) denote eigenvalues outside the unit circle, representing numerically unstable modes. For visual clarity, eigenvalues with |λ| > 3 are not shown.
